title: Schozach

infobox.value: This article related to a river in [Baden-Württemberg](/wiki/Baden-W%C3%BCrttemberg "Baden-Württemberg") is a [stub](/wiki/Wikipedia:Stub "Wikipedia:Stub"). You can help Wikipedia by [adding missing information](https://en.wikipedia.org/w/index.php?title=Schozach&action=edit).

is a [river](/wiki/River "River") in [Germany](/wiki/Germany "Germany"). It is a right [tributary](/wiki/Tributary "Tributary") of the [Neckar](/wiki/Neckar "Neckar") in the southern part of the [Heilbronn district](/wiki/Heilbronn_district "Heilbronn district") of [Baden-Württemberg](/wiki/Baden-W%C3%BCrttemberg "Baden-Württemberg"). It has its source near the village [Vorhof](/w/index.php?title=Vorhof&action=edit&redlink=1 "Vorhof (page does not exist)") near [Untergruppenbach](/wiki/Untergruppenbach "Untergruppenbach") in the [Löwenstein Hills](/wiki/L%C3%B6wenstein_Hills "Löwenstein Hills") and flows through [Oberheinriet](/w/index.php?title=Oberheinriet&action=edit&redlink=1 "Oberheinriet (page does not exist)"), [Unterheinriet](/w/index.php?title=Unterheinriet&action=edit&redlink=1 "Unterheinriet (page does not exist)"), [Abstatt](/wiki/Abstatt "Abstatt"), [Auenstein](/w/index.php?title=Auenstein,_Germany&action=edit&redlink=1 "Auenstein, Germany (page does not exist)") [[de](https://de.wikipedia.org/wiki/Auenstein_(Ilsfeld) "de:Auenstein (Ilsfeld)")], [Ilsfeld](/wiki/Ilsfeld "Ilsfeld"), Schozach and [Talheim](/wiki/Talheim,_Heilbronn "Talheim, Heilbronn"), and [Heilbronn](/wiki/Heilbronn "Heilbronn"), before it flows into the Neckar near Sontheim, part of Heilbronn. The source is on 301m above [sea level](/wiki/Sea_level "Sea level"), the confluence at 154m above sea level.
of the *Schozach* in the upper *Dautenklinge* in a northern tongue of forest meadows near [Untergruppenbach](/wiki/Untergruppenbach "Untergruppenbach") atrium on about 305 m.

first_paragraph: **Schozach** is a [river](/wiki/River "River") in [Germany](/wiki/Germany "Germany"). It is a right [tributary](/wiki/Tributary "Tributary") of the [Neckar](/wiki/Neckar "Neckar") in the southern part of the [Heilbronn district](/wiki/Heilbronn_district "Heilbronn district") of [Baden-Württemberg](/wiki/Baden-W%C3%BCrttemberg "Baden-Württemberg"). It has its source near the village [Vorhof](/w/index.php?title=Vorhof&action=edit&redlink=1 "Vorhof (page does not exist)") near [Untergruppenbach](/wiki/Untergruppenbach "Untergruppenbach") in the [Löwenstein Hills](/wiki/L%C3%B6wenstein_Hills "Löwenstein Hills") and flows through [Oberheinriet](/w/index.php?title=Oberheinriet&action=edit&redlink=1 "Oberheinriet (page does not exist)"), [Unterheinriet](/w/index.php?title=Unterheinriet&action=edit&redlink=1 "Unterheinriet (page does not exist)"), [Abstatt](/wiki/Abstatt "Abstatt"), [Auenstein](/w/index.php?title=Auenstein,_Germany&action=edit&redlink=1 "Auenstein, Germany (page does not exist)") [[de](https://de.wikipedia.org/wiki/Auenstein_(Ilsfeld) "de:Auenstein (Ilsfeld)")], [Ilsfeld](/wiki/Ilsfeld "Ilsfeld"), Schozach and [Talheim](/wiki/Talheim,_Heilbronn "Talheim, Heilbronn"), and [Heilbronn](/wiki/Heilbronn "Heilbronn"), before it flows into the Neckar near Sontheim, part of Heilbronn. The source is on 301m above [sea level](/wiki/Sea_level "Sea level"), the confluence at 154m above sea level.

**Schozach** is a [river](/wiki/River "River") in [Germany](/wiki/Germany "Germany"). It is a right [tributary](/wiki/Tributary "Tributary") of the [Neckar](/wiki/Neckar "Neckar") in the southern part of the [Heilbronn district](/wiki/Heilbronn_district "Heilbronn district") of [Baden-Württemberg](/wiki/Baden-W%C3%BCrttemberg "Baden-Württemberg"). It has its source near the village [Vorhof](/w/index.php?title=Vorhof&action=edit&redlink=1 "Vorhof (page does not exist)") near [Untergruppenbach](/wiki/Untergruppenbach "Untergruppenbach") in the [Löwenstein Hills](/wiki/L%C3%B6wenstein_Hills "Löwenstein Hills") and flows through [Oberheinriet](/w/index.php?title=Oberheinriet&action=edit&redlink=1 "Oberheinriet (page does not exist)"), [Unterheinriet](/w/index.php?title=Unterheinriet&action=edit&redlink=1 "Unterheinriet (page does not exist)"), [Abstatt](/wiki/Abstatt "Abstatt"), [Auenstein](/w/index.php?title=Auenstein,_Germany&action=edit&redlink=1 "Auenstein, Germany (page does not exist)") [[de](https://de.wikipedia.org/wiki/Auenstein_(Ilsfeld) "de:Auenstein (Ilsfeld)")], [Ilsfeld](/wiki/Ilsfeld "Ilsfeld"), Schozach and [Talheim](/wiki/Talheim,_Heilbronn "Talheim, Heilbronn"), and [Heilbronn](/wiki/Heilbronn "Heilbronn"), before it flows into the Neckar near Sontheim, part of Heilbronn. The source is on 301m above [sea level](/wiki/Sea_level "Sea level"), the confluence at 154m above sea level.

## Tributaries

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Schozach&action=edit&section=1 "Edit section: Tributaries")]

**Origin** of the *Schozach* in the upper *Dautenklinge* in a northern tongue of forest meadows near [Untergruppenbach](/wiki/Untergruppenbach "Untergruppenbach") atrium on about 305 m.

* Stream from the *Schwinglesklinge*, from right to 250 m at the footbridge at the end of Oberheinriet, 2,2 km. Occurs in the west of the *Masselterklinge* a little east of the [A 81](/wiki/Bundesautobahn_81 "Bundesautobahn 81") at about 330 m.
* Brook from the *Plankenklinge*, from right at the sports field of Unterheinriet, 1,0 km. Origins before the eastern edge of the *Grafenwald* at about 270 m and runs through three ponds.
* [Buchbach](/w/index.php?title=Buchbach_(Schozach)&action=edit&redlink=1 "Buchbach (Schozach) (page does not exist)"), from left on the *Breitwiesen* at the end of Unterheinriet at about 235 m 5,6 km.<! -- LUBW-FG10: 5,612 --> Origins in the [Löwensteiner](/wiki/L%C3%B6wenstein "Löwenstein") Waldgewann *Buch* at about 385 m next to the artificial *Mühlgraben*, which here supplies the water of its upper blade of wood, which continues to move further uphill, to the [Sulm](/wiki/Sulm_(Neckar) "Sulm (Neckar)").
* Bach from the *Scheidlesklinge*, from the left soon after opposite the Unterheinrieter industrial area, 1,2 km. Origins at

*Schellenrain* from several sources at about 310 m.

* *Vohenlohebach*, 1,0 km.
* [Happenbach](/w/index.php?title=Happenbach_(Schozach)&action=edit&redlink=1 "Happenbach (Schozach) (page does not exist)"), from the right after the first road bridge in [Abstatt](/wiki/Abstatt "Abstatt") on 234.3 m, 3,9 km. Occurs in the area of Untergruppenbach in the northern *Grafenwald* a little east of the [A 81](/wiki/Bundesautobahn_81 "Bundesautobahn 81") at about 325 .
* [Abstetter Bach](/w/index.php?title=Abstetter_Bach&action=edit&redlink=1 "Abstetter Bach (page does not exist)"), from left at the western edge of [Ilsfeld](/wiki/Ilsfeld "Ilsfeld")-Auenstein before the Schozach bridge of the feeder road to the junction Ilsfeld, at least 3.0 km. Origins southwest of the Abstetterhof just before the *Hammelwald* or in it at least 252 m.
* [Gruppenbach](/wiki/Gruppenbach_(Schozach) "Gruppenbach (Schozach)"), after the same road bridge on 226.3 m Occurs in the [Heilbronner Stadtwald](/w/index.php?title=Heilbronner_Stadtwald&action=edit&redlink=1 "Heilbronner Stadtwald (page does not exist)") at the eastern slope of the *Hintersberg* to the *Reisberg* at about 355 m.

After the inflow of the *Gruppenbach* and the crossing under the A 81 the river turns its flow direction from southwest to west.

* *Riegelbach*, canalized from the right at the Ilsfelder Bad at the Robert-Mayer-Straße, 1,7 km. Origins in the *Steinlesgrund* at about 260 m.
* *Eichenweggraben*, from left at the mountainous settlement edge of Ilsfeld, 1,2 km.
* *Eigersbach*, from the left at the bridge of the K 2156 from Ilsfeld to the Pfahlhof, 1,6 km. Develops beside the forest road at about 280 m, in the local area verdolt.
* *Wässerung*, from the right at the sewage plant below Ilsfelds below 225, 1,8 km. Occurs at the vineyard slope *Gänser* at about 275 m

After the inlet of the *Wässerung* the river enters its narrow, [meandering](/wiki/Meandering "Meandering") Muschelkalk blade at the lower reaches and turns its flow direction from west to north-northwest.

* *Landgraben*, below the Schozach bridge of [Schozach](/w/index.php?title=Schozach_(Ilsfeld)&action=edit&redlink=1 "Schozach (Ilsfeld) (page does not exist)"), 2,3 km. Develops as a road ditch at the junction of the K 2048 to Schozach from the L 1100 at about 290 m.
* [Frankelbach](/w/index.php?title=Frankelbach_(Schozach)&action=edit&redlink=1 "Frankelbach (Schozach) (page does not exist)"), from right in the south [Talheims](/w/index.php?title=Talheim_(district_Heilbronn)&action=edit&redlink=1 "Talheim (district Heilbronn) (page does not exist)") on 195.9 m, 3,1 km. Occurs in the middle *Durstlache* at about 265 m and after a little more than half the run it passes the 1,3 ha big *Frankelbachsee*.
* [Deinenbach](/w/index.php?title=Deinenbach&action=edit&redlink=1 "Deinenbach (page does not exist)"), from the right about hundred meters before the mouth, 7,3 km. Origins on the district of [Flein](/wiki/Flein "Flein") east of the vineyard *Kapfenhart* on about 260 m.

The *Schozach* after 25.6 km run about 400 km below the Neckar bridge of the Neckar valley road (K 9564) at house No. 32/1 of the Horkheimer road in [Heilbronn](/wiki/Heilbronn "Heilbronn")-[Sontheim](/w/index.php?title=Sontheim_(Heilbronn)&action=edit&redlink=1 "Sontheim (Heilbronn) (page does not exist)") at 154.0 m from the right into the [Neckar](/wiki/Neckar "Neckar").
